steps.title: Spot the surplus and the signal
steps.content: The passage reveals that the irrigation method allowed the Sumerians to harvest “more crops than they needed in a season.” The transition “As a result” points to the logical consequence of this surplus.

steps.title: Apply the consequence to the choices
steps.content: D directly states the logical result of having a surplus: storing extra crops for later use. The other choices either describe an unrelated harvest practice (A), address an already-solved drying problem (B), or contradict the passage's timeline (C). That matches choice D — D is correct.
